headline: 2 Reasons to Like XOM (and 1 Not So Much)
summary: ExxonMobil currently trades at $154.29 and has been a dream stock for shareholders. It’s returned 178% since April 2021, nearly tripling the S&P 500’s 64.2% gain. The company has also beaten the index over the past six months as its stock price is up 39.3%.
